item.title: A Deeper Dive Into Python - zip()
item.description: The Python zip() function. Table Of Contents - [Introduction](#introduction) - [Declaration](#declaration) - [Examples](#examples) - [Conclusion](#conclusion) Introduction The official docs for the zip() function can be found here Declaration Examples Conclusion
